channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FICO’s stock falls as Fannie and Freddie deal the credit-score company a new blow
item.description: The government-backed entities are embracing a rival type of credit score.

item.title: Tilray and other cannabis stocks soar as Trump is reportedly ready to reclassify the substance
item.description: The move, which could open up medical research on cannabis as well as banking services for growers, follows an executive order to reclassify the subst...

item.title: Iran attacks oil tankers in Hormuz, sending oil back above $101 a barrel
item.description: Oil-supply disruptions are starting to take hold, beyond $4-a-gallon gas.

item.title: My 20-year-old daughter quit her job. What should she do with her 401(k)?
item.description: “When I was younger, I didn’t know anything about 401(k)s.”

item.title: ‘Some stocks have risen, but others have flopped’: I will soon inherit my parents’ $1.5 million estate. Do I fire the adviser who charges a 3% fee?
item.description: “This broker does not achieve returns better than the S&P 500.”

item.title: How to Choose a Web Design Company That Understands Your Customers

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
